iterations.theme: The Evolving Landscape and Investment Potential of Consumer Subscription Software (CSS)
iterations.reason_for_cut: This iteration covers the entire podcast, from the introduction of the guest and his background to a deep dive into the consumer subscription software market, its investment landscape, and future trends, concluding with contact information.
